briefing: Markets pushed higher on a moderate risk-on session with NASDAQ +1.1% and S&P +0.7%, creating a solid deployment window without overheating signals. QNT is the standout buy — it hits all four confirmation criteria including a volume surge that flags institutional accumulation, which the strategy memory treats as the highest-quality entry signal. All six existing positions are healthy and tracking within their profit-target and stop-loss bands, so no manual exits are warranted.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume jumps well above its recent average — typically 1.5x or more. It signals that large institutional investors (funds, banks) are actively buying, which is far more significant than retail-driven price moves. When volume surges alongside bullish technical signals like a MACD crossover and RSI in the momentum zone, it suggests the move has conviction behind it and is less likely to be a false breakout.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增，指的是一隻股票的交易量遠高於近期平均水平——通常達到1.5倍或以上。這代表大型機構投資者（如基金、銀行）正在積極買入，其意義遠比散戶主導的價格波動更為重要。當成交量激增同時配合看漲的技術指標（例如MACD黃金交叉，以及RSI處於動能區間），便意味著這波升勢具有實質支撐，出現假突破的機會相對較低。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly on July 6 as investors continued pricing in resilient economic data and fading recession fears, lifting the S&P 500 +0.7% and the tech-heavy NASDAQ +1.1%. Sector rotation remained tilted toward growth and small-caps, reflecting renewed risk appetite heading into the second half of 2026. With no major macro shocks on the tape, the session was driven by momentum continuation rather than a single catalyst.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於7月6日全面上揚，投資者持續消化強韌的經濟數據，並淡化衰退憂慮，標普500指數上漲0.7%，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數則上漲1.1%。板塊輪動繼續偏向成長股與小型股，反映市場進入2026年下半年後風險胃納改善。由於當日未有重大宏觀衝擊，整體行情主要由動能延續所帶動，而非單一催化劑驅動。

trades.reasoning: Top-scored candidate (95) with all four multi-signal confirmations: MACD crossover, RSI 57 in bullish zone, price above SMA-20, and volume surge indicating institutional participation — deploying remaining cash on this moderate risk-on day.
